validation_checks.name: validators_nonzero
validation_checks.description: Registration data contains a non-trivial number of unique validators for dependency analysis

validation_checks.name: fee_recipients_nonzero
validation_checks.description: Fee recipient count supports meaningful aggregation analysis

validation_checks.name: relay_count_sufficient
validation_checks.description: Multiple relays exist to measure registration breadth and delivery concentration

validation_checks.name: builder_count_sufficient
validation_checks.description: Builder population supports meaningful concentration analysis

validation_checks.name: concentration_scenarios_documented
validation_checks.description: At least one concentration risk scenario quantified with estimated impact
validation_checks.value: 4 scenarios: top-1 builder offline (20-35% impact), top-3 builders offline (55-75%), top-1 relay offline (<5%), top-2 relays offline (5-15%)

validation_checks.name: limitations_documented
validation_checks.value: 7 caveats documented: single-day, no GROUP BY, identity ambiguity, no value weighting, registration vs delivery, static snapshot, builder identity
